{{Quote|We offer Cartann a seat, a full vote, a full voice in what we now call the Adumari Union.|[[Perator]] [[Escalion]] to [[Balass ke Teldan]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar">''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''</ref>}}
The '''Adumari Union''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] state created through the unification of [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]], located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] after a brief [[Adumari Civil War|civil war]] and became a member world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
